item.nerdkube.reliquia_desbravador.lore: The final audacity pillar amulet. Place on the east pedestal in the Cube Maker ritual.
item.nerdkube.fragmento_matriz_dados.lor: A piece of PneumaticCraft printed circuit silicon that collapsed while trying to calculate the physical limits of an Applied Energistics 2 singularity.
item.nerdkube.processador_antimateria_in: This component was forged in the Atomic Forge by injecting concentrated Mekanism antimatter into an Oritech Insanite structural chassis.
item.nerdkube.mecanismo_sombra_corrompid: An RFTools machine casing that underwent biological and structural mutation after being hit by a strong Just Dire Things ShadowPulse.
item.nerdkube.nucleo_logico_infundido.lo: The perfect geometric result of aligning the sculk gear with the resonant frequencies of an infused end pearl.
item.nerdkube.matriz_modular_estabilizad: The purified logic fragment after exposure to the Actually Additions Empowerer laser beam and rapid cooling with Oritech dry ice.
item.nerdkube.chassi_cyber_flux.lore: A high-density circuit board created by crossing XNet wiring over Flux Networks storage cells.
item.nerdkube.disco_materia_escura.lore: The stable physical form that Ender IO liquid darkness assumes after Mekanism chemical crystallization.
item.nerdkube.singularidade_hipercarrega: This disc was saturated in the Powah Energizing Orb with an impressive 10 billion FE, making its core highly unstable and radioactive.
item.nerdkube.oferta_poco_sombria.lore: A wild tribute steeped in lightning, ready to be risked where light cannot reach.
item.nerdkube.componente_magia_stage1_co: A wild tribute wrapped in golden Malum runic metal, dripping purified blood from its edges.
item.nerdkube.fragmento_magia_stage2.lor: An ancient Iron's Spellbooks tome whose pages were forced open to stamp Occultism's invocation seal.
item.nerdkube.componente_magia_stage2_co: The forbidden scroll after being consumed by Malum altar flames, leaving only a ashen artifact impregnated with spirits.
item.nerdkube.matriz_runica.lore: A circular channeler woven from Magebloom fibers to stabilize portals and high-risk rituals.
item.nerdkube.essencia_vital_instavel.lo: A highly volatile mixture of necromantic tomes dissolved in demonic blood, about to shatter its glass prison.
item.nerdkube.fragmento_agri_stage1.lore: A colossal genetically modified Insanium seed pulsing with the residual heat of a nether star.
item.nerdkube.pacote_essencias_agri.lore: Cosmic fragments sealed with Supremium honeycomb and alchemical honey, ready for the industrial centrifuge.
item.nerdkube.componente_agri_stage1_com: Agricultural essences stabilized in alchemical honey. Next: save 2 for the final Cooking Pot craft.
item.nerdkube.runic_crystal_cake.lore: Master-crystal infused masterpiece. Next: plant in an Ultra Botany Pot with Supremium soil.
item.nerdkube.massa_runica_crua.lore: Ritual dough ready for infusion. Place on ground or Caking Station; then use the Master Crystal.
item.nerdkube.raizes_doces.lore: Tubers harvested from the planted cake. Next: fry 3 units in the Farmer's Delight Skillet.
item.nerdkube.raizes_doces_fritas.lore: Golden skillet roots. Mix with a Bakery jar to seal the ancestral preserve.
item.nerdkube.raizes_ancestrais_em_conse: Ancient roots that will never spoil, sealed after frying and curing in a Bakery jar.
item.nerdkube.altar_revestimento_agri.lo: Heavy bench for gastronomic rituals. Craft on a 3×3 table; then 1 unit in the final Cooking Pot.
Condensed epic feast. Next: save 2 for the final Cooking Pot craft.
item.nerdkube.fragmento_combate_stage1.l: An ancestral bone shard solidified in a pool of liquid experience and mythical predator essence.
item.nerdkube.componente_combate_stage1_: The bone amulet shattered completely, releasing the echo of a Void Worm's dying roar.
item.nerdkube.fragmento_combate_stage2.l: A semi-destroyed military medal found at the bottom of time-locked chests in forgotten structures.
item.nerdkube.componente_combate_stage2_: The metal insignia was fused to the dimensional predator's eye, watching those who carry it.
item.nerdkube.lamina_conquistador.lore: What remained of a legendary cutting weapon after being consumed on an anvil to extract its perfect edge.
item.nerdkube.olho_desbravador_primal.lo: A disturbing artifact created by crushing the twelve eyes that locked the universe's portals into a single lens.
item.nerdkube.poeira_transmutacao_proibi: Unstable star dust obtained by collapsing a beacon's energy in the hidden alchemy matrices.
nerdkube.transmutation.insufficient_xp: You need at least %s experience levels.
nerdkube.transmutation.fail: §cThe beacon was consumed by the alchemical void. The roll failed.
nerdkube.ritual.already_crafted: §cYou have already crafted the maximum of 1 NerdCube!
nerdkube.ritual.missing_crafter: §cPlace a Crafter in the cube maker.
nerdkube.ritual.wrong_offering: §cThis pedestal does not accept that amulet.
nerdkube.jade.pedestal.status.label: Status: %s
nerdkube.jade.pedestal.status.wrong_posi: §cWrong position — place on the %s of the Cube Maker
nerdkube.jade.ferment.status.label: Status: %s
nerdkube.ferment.status.label: Status: %s
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_tech.line1: Use: technology ritual pedestal (north of Cube Maker).
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_tech.line2: Obtain: PneumaticCraft — 5×5×5 Pressure Chamber at 16 bar.
nerdkube.jei.info.fragmento_matriz_dados: Obtain: Ender IO — Alloy Smelter (PCB + Singularity + End Steel).
nerdkube.jei.info.processador_antimateri: Obtain: Oritech — Atomic Forge: 2× Data Matrix Fragment + Insanite (Extreme Reactors).
nerdkube.jei.info.sculk_gear_crystal.lin: Use: visual intermediate — break to obtain the mechanism.
Obtain: Goo Spread Tier 4 (JDT) — machine_frame beside active Eclipse Goo.
nerdkube.jei.info.mecanismo_sombra_corro: Use: center of Infused Logic Core craft.
Obtain: break a sculk_gear_crystal (generated by Goo Spread).
nerdkube.jei.info.nucleo_logico_infundid: Obtain: crafting table 3×3 (mechanism + Super AI Chip + infused pearls).
nerdkube.jei.info.matriz_modular_estabil: Obtain: Actually Additions — Empowerer (4 display stands).
nerdkube.jei.info.chassi_cyber_flux.line: Obtain: crafting table cross (CC:Tweaked + Flux Networks + XNet).
nerdkube.jei.info.singularidade_hipercar: Obtain: Powah — Energizing Orb (10 billion FE).
nerdkube.jei.info.nucleo_de_materia.line: Use: technology amulet (north pedestal of Cube Maker).
Obtain: PneumaticCraft 16 bar (2× Singularity, Cyber-Flux Chassis, 3× Processor, 3× Matrix).
nerdkube.jei.info.coracao_arcano.line1: Use: magic amulet (south pedestal of Cube Maker).
nerdkube.jei.info.coracao_arcano.line2: Obtain: Ars Nouveau — Enchanting Apparatus (Runic Matrix + magic line components).
nerdkube.jei.info.reliquia_desbravador.l: §6Final amulet§r — place on the exploration pedestal (east).
§eRitual at the Enchanting Table§r while holding the Primal Visor:
• 1× Blade Hilt | 3× Void Soul Core | 3× Forge Eye
Requires Apothic shelves: Eterna 50, Quanta 80, Arcana 95.
Complete combat and loot lines before the Cube ritual.
nerdkube.jei.info.semente_criacao.line1: §6Final amulet§r — place on the agriculture pedestal (west) in the ritual.
nerdkube.jei.info.semente_criacao.line7: Complete all 3 progression lines before the final craft.
nerdkube.jei.info.semente_criacao.line8: Press + to see the Cooking Pot recipe.
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_magia.line1: Use: magic ritual pedestal (south of Cube Maker).
nerdkube.jei.info.oferta_poco_sombria.li: Use: offering for the Purified Shadow Heart.
Obtain: mix lightning into the Tablet of a mysterious creature.
No JEI recipe — then risk it in a hole with no visible bottom.
nerdkube.jei.info.componente_magia_stage: Obtain: throw the Offering to the Abyss into a hole with no visible bottom.
The void returns a purified heart — see the offering in JEI.
nerdkube.jei.info.fragmento_magia_stage2: Obtain: crafting table (scroll + legendary ink + datura seeds).
Thematic equivalent to Iron's Spellbooks Inscription Table.
nerdkube.jei.info.componente_magia_stage: Obtain: Malum — Spirit Altar (earthen, infernal and arcane spirits).
nerdkube.jei.info.matriz_runica.line1: Use: core of Arcane Heart craft.
nerdkube.jei.info.matriz_runica.line2: Obtain: pentagram crafting table (purified ink + twisted rock + magebloom).
nerdkube.jei.info.essencia_vital_instave: Obtain: EvilCraft — Blood Infuser tier III (ruined_book + 600,000 mB blood).
Thematic: dissolve the tome in blood, then saturate in the sanguinary basin.
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_exploracao.li: §6Ritual pedestal§r — east of the Cube Maker.
§eCraft on a 3×3 table§r (Silent Gear + Waystones + Pylons):
Waystone | Netherite | Waystone / Crimson Steel | Pylon | Crimson Steel / Obsidian | Mega Torch | Obsidian
Receives the Explorer's Relic in the final ritual.
nerdkube.jei.info.fragmento_combate_stag: Solidifier: 5000 mB liquid XP + Wither Skeleton skull.
Use an Absorption Hopper to collect fluid_xp from farms.
Next: kill a Void Worm or Grizzly — §e1 boss = 1 amulet§r transformed.
nerdkube.jei.info.componente_combate_sta: §e1 boss kill§r transforms §e1§r Petrified Blood Amulet (not the whole stack).
§eSave 3 units§r for the final amulet ritual.
nerdkube.jei.info.fragmento_combate_stag: Requires §e3 artifacts§r (Artifacts/Curios) in inventory to drop.
nerdkube.jei.info.componente_combate_sta: Center: Insignia | sides: Void Worm Eye | corners: Chaos Essence.
nerdkube.jei.info.lamina_conquistador.li: Craft 3×3: corners §e4× Netherfused Gem§r, cross §e4× Sculk Boomer§r, center §e1 unique§r Simply Swords weapon.
The unique weapon is consumed. Used in the final Enchanting Table ritual.
nerdkube.jei.info.olho_desbravador_prima: 3×3 craft: 8 End Remastered eyes + nether star center.
Click the Enchanting Table with all components + 1× Forbidden Dust.
nerdkube.jei.info.poeira_transmutacao_pr: Table craft: §enether star§r + §e2× farseer_arm§r + §e3× obsidian§r (Alex's Mobs recipe).
Cost: §e30 XP levels§r + 1 Beacon (always consumed). §e2%§r success chance.
May also appear in the table's §erare slot§r (Alex's Mobs loot table).
§e1 unit§r in the Explorer's Relic ritual (Enchanting Table).
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_agricultura.l: Obtain: craft raw pedestal, then finish at Carpenter's Table (Chipped).
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_bruto.line2: Obtain: 3×3 crafting table (FramedBlocks, Rechiseled, Supremium, Macaw's).
nerdkube.jei.info.pedestal_bruto.line3: Finish with Carpenter's Table → agriculture pedestal.
Obtain: Mystical Agriculture — Infusion Altar (Insanium block + essences).
Obtain: craft (3× fragment + Supremium comb + honey bucket).
Represents the industrial hive in JEI.
nerdkube.jei.info.componente_agri_stage1: §6Honey line (step 3)§r — save §e2 units§r for the final craft.
Obtain: centrifuge the Agricultural Essence Bundle.
Chain: Cosmic Seed → bundle → centrifuge → this cocoon.
Used with preserve, feast and kitchen module in the Cooking Pot.
Press + on Seed of Creation to see usage.
nerdkube.jei.info.massa_runica_crua.line: §6Step 4a — mixing and ritual§r (Let's Do / Farm & Charm).
Obtain: Crafting Bowl (flour + emu egg + milk).
Place dough on the ground or on the §eCaking Station§r.
Right-click dough with §eMaster Infusion Crystal§r → Mystic Cake (crystal not consumed).
On the mystic cake: empty hand → harvestable Runic Crystal Cake item.
Press + to see the Crafting Bowl recipe in JEI.
nerdkube.jei.info.runic_crystal_cake.lin: 3) Use §ethis cake§r as the seed in the pot.
How to obtain: dough ritual + crystal at the Caking Station.
Fry 3 roots in the §eFarmer's Delight skillet§r → craft with a Bakery jar.
The preserve goes in the final Cooking Pot (press + on Seed of Creation).
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces.line1: §6Step 5 — botanical harvest.§r Do not plant again.
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces.line2: Comes from the §eRunic Crystal Cake§r in Ultra Pot + Supremium soil.
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces.line3: §eSave 3 units§r to fry in the Farmer's Delight skillet.
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces.line4: Place each root on §efarmersdelight:skillet§r over heat (frying recipe).
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces.line5: Output: §aFried Sweet Roots§r — then craft with a Bakery jar.
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces.line6: Next: §aAncestral Roots in Preserve§r in the Seed of Creation Cooking Pot.
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_doces_fritas.li: Requires heat below (campfire, furnace, mod stove).
Craft: §e1× bakery:jar§r + §e3× Fried Sweet Roots§r → Ancestral Preserve.
Press + on the Farmer's Delight skillet for the frying recipe.
nerdkube.jei.info.raizes_ancestrais_em_c: §e1 unit§r in the Seed of Creation Cooking Pot.
Along with 2 cocoons, 2 feasts and 1 kitchen module.
Press + on Seed of Creation to see the recipe.
Need more roots? Plant more runic cakes in the ultra pot.
nerdkube.jei.info.farmersdelight_skillet: Place the skillet over a heat source and toss the item on top.
Uses §esmelting§r recipes — e.g. egg → fried egg, bacon → cooked bacon.
nerdkube.jei.info.alexsmobs_transmutatio: Three slots (common / uncommon / rare) using the mod's loot tables.
nerdkube.jei.info.bakery_crafting_bowl.l: §6[Let's Do] Bakery§r — step 1 of the baking line.
Mix ingredients in the bowl (not a 3×3 craft).
Used for runic dough, cake dough and other modpack bakes.
See recipes in the §bCrafting Bowl§r JEI tab.
nerdkube.jei.info.bakery_baker_station.l: Vanilla cakes: §ebakery:cake_dough§r on top → blank cake → jam.
NerdKube line: place §eraw runic dough§r on top of the station.
Click dough with §eMaster Crystal§r → Mystic Cake → harvest Runic Crystal Cake.
Press + on raw runic dough for the full JEI flow.
nerdkube.jei.info.altar_revestimento_agr: §6Decoration line§r — §e1 unit§r as an ingredient in the final Cooking Pot.
§eCraft on a 3×3 crafting table§r (vanilla JEI recipe):
Row 2: picket fence | stone stairs | picket fence.
Press + on this item to see the grid in the Crafting JEI tab.
nerdkube.jei.info.massa_nutrientes_supre: §6Feast line§r — save §e2 units§r for the final craft.
Obtain: Cooking Pot (roast chicken, shepherd's pie, chocolate cake, butter).
Used in the §aSeed of Creation§r recipe (press + on the amulet).
2) Farm & Charm pot: milk + chocolate + sugar + jar → §ebakery:chocolate_jam§r.
3) Place cake dough on the §eCaking Station§r; apply jam → §ebakery:chocolate_cake§r.
Use the chocolate cake in this feast's Cooking Pot recipe (press +).
nerdkube.jei.info.cube_maker.line3: See NerdCube Ritual category in JEI.
nerdkube.jei.info.nerd_cube.line3: See NerdCube Ritual category in JEI.
nerdkube.eternal_cube.admin_only: §cOnly server administrators can place or remove the Eternal Cube.
nerdkube.exploration.amulet.missing_ingr: §cMissing components to forge the Explorer's Relic.
